title: abrus pulchellus subsp. mollis
intro: Abrus pulchellus subsp. mollis, also known as the velvet crab's eye or velvet jicama, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Abrus pulchellus subsp. mollis include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
